# Eagle Mountain Trailer Rental LLC

> Veteran-owned trailer rental company in Eagle Mountain, Utah, serving all of
> Utah County. Dump trailers, enclosed trailers, and utility trailers for rent.
> Open 24/7 with instant online booking — no phone call required, no hidden fees.

## Key Facts
- Business: Eagle Mountain Trailer Rental LLC (veteran-owned, local)
- Location: Eagle Mountain, UT 84005 (customer pickup; serves Utah County)
- Phone: (385) 269-0712
- Email: emtrailerrentals@gmail.com
- Hours: Open 24/7 — online booking available any time, day or night
- After-hours support: AI-assisted phone and text, 24/7
- Rating: 5.0 stars from 7 Google reviews
- Booking: customer pickup only (no delivery at this time)
- What's needed to rent: valid driver's license, proof of auto insurance, and a
  vehicle with the correct hitch and plug for the trailer

## Trailers & Pricing
- Utility Trailer — 7'×14' open deck, 1,945 lb capacity: $40/day, $240/week, $900/month
- Dump Trailer — 7×14, 14,000 lb GVWR / 9,800 lb payload, hydraulic dump: $80/day, $500/week, $1,200/month
- Enclosed Trailer — 24ft, 6,130 lb capacity, lockable & weather-protected: $85/day, $510/week, $1,500/month

- [Home](https://emtrailerrentals.rent/)

## Service Areas
Eagle Mountain, Saratoga Springs, Lehi, American Fork, Cedar Valley, Herriman,
Bluffdale, Riverton, South Jordan, Draper, Spanish Fork, Springville, Payson,
and Provo — all in Utah.
- Area pages: https://emtrailerrentals.rent/areas/<city>.html

## Booking
Reserve online any time at https://emtrailerrentals.hqrent.com/
